data.label: Embedding Retriever Operator
data.name: embedding_retriever_operator
data.description: Retrieve candidates from vector store.

parameters.label: Score Threshold
parameters.name: score_threshold
parameters.description: The score threshold, if score of candidate is less than it, it will be filtered.

data.label: Vector Store Connector
data.name: vector_store_connector
data.description:
The connector for vector store.

    VectorStoreConnector, can connect different vector db provided load document api_v1
    and similar search api_v1.

    1.load_document:knowledge document source into vector store.(Chroma, Milvus,
    Weaviate).
    2.similar_search: similarity search from vector_store.
    3.similar_search_with_scores: similarity search with similarity score from
    vector_store

    code example:
    >>> from dbgpt.storage.vector_store.connector import VectorStoreConnector

    >>> vector_store_config = VectorStoreConfig
    >>> vector_store_connector = VectorStoreConnector(vector_store_type="Chroma")

data.label: Chroma Vector Store
data.name: chroma_vector_store
data.description: Chroma vector store.

parameters.label: Collection Name
parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of vector store, if not set, will use the default name.

parameters.label: User
parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user of vector store, if not set, will use the default user.

parameters.label: Password
parameters.name: password
parameters.description: The password of vector store, if not set, will use the default password.

parameters.label: Embedding Function
parameters.name: embedding_fn
parameters.description: The embedding function of vector store, if not set, will use the default embedding function.

parameters.label: Max Chunks Once Load
parameters.name: max_chunks_once_load
parameters.description: The max number of chunks to load at once. If your document is large, you can set this value to a larger number to speed up the loading process. Default is 10.

parameters.label: Max Threads
parameters.name: max_threads
parameters.description: The max number of threads to use. Default is 1. If you set this bigger than 1, please make sure your vector store is thread-safe.

parameters.label: Persist Path
parameters.name: persist_path
parameters.description: the persist path of vector store.

data.label: Default Embeddings
data.name: default_embeddings
data.description: Default embeddings(using default embedding model of current system)

data.label: Request Body Parsed To String Operator
data.name: request_body_to_str__parsed_operator
data.description: User input parsed operator, parse the user input from request body and return as a string

parameters.label: Key
parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key of the dict, link 'user_input'

inputs.label: Request Body
inputs.name: request_body
inputs.description: The request body of the API endpoint

outputs.label: User Input String
outputs.name: user_input_str
outputs.description: The user input dict of the API endpoint

data.label: Common LLM Http Trigger
data.name: common_llm_http_trigger
data.description: Trigger your workflow by http request, and parse the request body as a common LLM http body

parameters.label: Http Methods
parameters.name: methods
parameters.description: The methods of the API endpoint

parameters.label: Http Response Body
parameters.name: http_response_body
parameters.description: The response body of the API endpoint

outputs.label: Request Body
outputs.name: request_body
outputs.description: The request body of the API endpoint, parse as a common LLM http body

data.label: Chunks To String Operator
data.name: chunks_to_string_operator
data.description: Convert chunks to string.

data.label: Merge String to Dict Operator
data.name: merge_string_to_dict_operator
data.description: Merge two strings to a dict, the fist string which is the value from first upstream is the value of the key `first_key`, the second string which is the value from second upstream is the value of the key `second_key`.

parameters.label: First Key
parameters.name: first_key
parameters.description: The key for the first string, default is `user_input`.

parameters.label: Second Key
parameters.name: second_key
parameters.description: The key for the second string, default is `context`.

inputs.label: First String
inputs.name: first
inputs.description: The first string from first upstream.

inputs.label: Second String
inputs.name: second
inputs.description: The second string from second upstream.

data.label: Common Chat Prompt Template
data.name: common_chat_prompt_template
data.description: The operator to build the prompt with static prompt.

parameters.label: System Message
parameters.name: system_message
parameters.default: You are a helpful AI Assistant.
parameters.value: Based on the known information below, provide users with professional and concise answers to their questions.  If the answer cannot be obtained from the provided content, please say:  "The information provided in the knowledge base is not sufficient to answer this question.".  It is forbidden to make up information randomly. When answering, it is best to summarize according to points 1.2.3.           known information:            {context}           question:           {user_input}

parameters.label: Conversation Storage
parameters.name: storage
parameters.description: The conversation storage, store the conversation items(Not include message items). If None, we will use InMemoryStorage.
